given: a warehouse operator with no stock recorded at a location
when: the home screen is opened for that location
then: an explicit "No stock at this location" message is shown in place of the table, never a blank page

independence.rationale: AC1 and AC2 cover the populated table and its quantity alignment; this adds the distinct empty-state outcome shown when no records exist, which can fail (blank page) while the populated-table behavior stays green, and vice versa.
